summary: Good‑sounding recording highlighted by a superb Black Peter and an epic Terrapin Station finale.
review: The reviewer rates the show four stars, praising the Black Peter performance and calling the Terrapin Station finale a must‑listen moment. No specific audio flaws are mentioned, implying the recording is at least listenable if not pristine. Overall the set is described as flowing well from the opening material through to an impressive closing jam.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 4‑star review; positive comments about performance and no noted recording problems suggest an overall good show with acceptable sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific audio issues or source details mentioned in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes a strong middle with Black Peter and an especially satisfying Terrapin Station finale, indicating a well‑balanced set.
